issues.title: Non-intuitive initial contact force direction
issues.detail: The initial displacement x0=0.8m exceeds gap=0.5m, so the mass starts in contact with the end stop. The initial contact force F_contact_start = -300 N is negative, which would pull the mass further into the stop (acting in the same direction as the main spring force). This is counter-intuitive for a compressive contact. However, the original_user_task does not specify the sign convention for contact force. The current implementation (F_contact = -k_contact * penetration - c_contact * v) treats positive penetration (x>gap) as compression, but then the spring term is negative, making the contact force a restoring force that pushes the mass away from the stop (if the damping term is small). Given the initial velocity is zero, F_contact_start = -1000*(0.8-0.5) = -300 N. This sign convention is mathematically consistent but may be physically confusing. Check if the force direction aligns with the intended physical behavior.
issues.evidence: parameter x0=0.8, gap=0.5; equation F_contact = if in_contact then (-k_contact * penetration - c_contact * v) else 0; result_summary shows F_contact.start = -300.00000000000006 N

issues.title: Discrete variable 'contact' defined but not utilized
issues.detail: A discrete Boolean variable 'contact' is defined and updated (contact = penetration > 0) but is not used in any conditional equations (when clauses) or to trigger state reinitialization. This variable appears redundant as the continuous 'in_contact' already captures the contact state. It may be intended for event handling, but without usage, it adds unnecessary complexity.
issues.evidence: discrete Boolean contact(start=x0 > gap); equation contact = penetration > 0;

issues.title: Parameter 'eps' defined but not used
issues.detail: A parameter eps=1e-6 m is declared with a comment 'Small tolerance for contact threshold', but it is not used in the contact condition (penetration > 0). Using a tolerance like (penetration > eps) can improve numerical robustness at the contact boundary.
issues.evidence: parameter Real eps(unit="m") = 1e-6; contact condition uses penetration > 0

recommendations: Consider clarifying the sign convention for contact force in the model description or comments to avoid confusion. The current implementation is mathematically valid but may not match typical engineering intuition where contact force opposes penetration (i.e., positive when compressed).
Remove the unused discrete variable 'contact' or implement proper event-driven reinitialization if needed (e.g., to reset velocity on impact if a restitution coefficient is added).
Incorporate the tolerance parameter 'eps' into the contact condition (e.g., in_contact = penetration > eps) to avoid numerical chattering near the boundary.

issues.title: 未使用的参数 eps
issues.detail: 参数 eps 被定义但未在方程中使用，可能原计划用于接触阈值的事件处理但未实现。这不会影响物理正确性或仿真结果，但可能造成代码冗余。
issues.evidence: parameter Real eps(unit="m") = 1e-6 "Small tolerance for contact threshold";

issues.title: 离散状态 contact 的连续赋值
issues.detail: 离散变量 contact 通过连续方程 'contact = penetration > 0' 赋值，而不是在 when 语句中更新。在 Modelica 中，这可能导致事件检测不精确，但仿真成功且结果合理，表明当前方法可行。建议优化事件处理以提高数值效率。
issues.evidence: discrete Boolean contact(start=x0 > gap); contact = penetration > 0;

recommendations: 移除未使用的参数 eps 以简化代码。
考虑使用 when 语句更新离散状态 contact，例如 'when penetration > 0 then contact = true; elsewhen penetration <= 0 then contact = false; end when;'，以改进事件处理。

issues.title: 总机械能 E_total 显示非单调行为
issues.detail: 在仿真过程中，E_total 达到最大值 49.52 J，大于初始值 16 J。这是由于接触力中的弹簧成分（-k_contact * penetration）做功，但接触弹簧势能未被计入 E_total（根据需求定义）。这可能导致 E_total 暂时增加，但最终由于阻尼耗散而减少到 0.149 J，符合物理预期。模型实现正确反映了需求。

recommendations: 为确保能量分析清晰，可在文档中明确说明 E_total 波动的原因。
